title: Popover
description: A component that displays a floating panel containing additional content or controls. It can be positioned relative to a target element and supports various placement options.

sections.title: Open on Hover
sections.description: Open the popover when hovering over the target element.

sections.title: Close on Leave
sections.description: Close the popover when the pointer leaves the target or popover.

sections.title: Open and Close Methods
sections.description: Programmatically open, close, or toggle the popover.

props.name: target
props.description: The element the popover is positioned relative to. Accepts Element, ElementRef, or MXBaseComponent.

props.name: placement
props.description: Placement of the popover relative to the target.

props.name: content
props.description: Content to display inside the popover. Can be a TemplateRef or a ComponentType.

props.name: hasBackdrop
props.description: Whether to show a backdrop behind the popover.

props.name: openAfter
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before opening after the trigger.

props.name: closeAfter
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before closing after the trigger.

props.name: backdropClass
props.description: CSS class to apply to the backdrop element.

props.name: panelClass
props.description: CSS class to apply to the panel element.

props.name: adaptivityEnabled
props.description: Enables action sheet style on small screens.

props.name: width
props.description: Overlay width. Can be 'auto' or a CSS length value.

events.name: onOpened
events.description: Emitted after the popover is opened.

events.name: onClosed
events.description: Emitted after the popover is closed.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Toggles the component's open state.
 */
toggle(): void

/**
 * Closes the component if it's open, detaches the overlay, restores focus, and emits the closed event.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Opens the component if it's not already open, saves focus, opens the overlay, and emits the opened event.
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Updates the position of the overlay and focuses on it.
 */
updatePosition(): void

/**
 * Focuses the overlay element.
 */
focus(): void
